mechanism: Automation is a platform service within each landing zone. Job definitions and images are managed centrally; instances run inside the landing zone's subscription.
why: External automation would require a shared management subscription with baseline cost and team dependency, but the platform has no such subscription. Landing-zone-native automation is self-contained, cost-free at idle, and independently deployable.

related.note: Automation is a per-landing-zone capability like VNet, identity, and monitoring.
Container App Jobs — consumption-based, zero idle cost, landing-zone-scoped.
Tag remediation runs as a landing-zone-native job.

violations: Automation job running from a resource outside the landing zone subscription.
Job definition or image managed per landing zone independently — central update propagation broken.
